transcript:
CALLER: Hi, I wanted to find out if Dr. Vikram Rao is available this Saturday. He's a cardiologist I think.
AGENT: Let me check that for you. Could you also share whether this is for a follow-up or a new consultation?
CALLER: It's a follow-up. He did my angioplasty last year.
AGENT: I see. I'm sorry, but specific doctor scheduling details, especially for post-procedure follow-ups with senior specialists, are something I'm not able to confirm accurately from this line. I wouldn't want to give you incorrect information. Let me connect you to our staff who have direct access to Dr. Vikram Rao's schedule.
CALLER: Alright, please transfer me then.
AGENT: Of course. Please hold and I'll connect you to our staff right away.
